full_text:
Sun Fu (Guoyi) 孫輔 (國儀)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Fu (孫輔), styledGuoyi (國儀). Second son of Sun Qiang. Imprisoned after trying to surrender to Cao Cao. Sun Fu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Fu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
